summary: All 8 criteria pass, 7/7 required. Full suite 2290 tests pass — ZERO regressions (this sprint touched live evaluator-agent.ts + pipeline.ts). sc-3-7 off-path invariant independently verified: loopSpy proves the LLM judge still runs when selfImprove is absent/all-false; gate ON skips it with passed===false. All three new branches use config.selfImprove?. optional chaining (grep-confirmed). redactRubric wraps the generator-bound injectedHandoff only (not evalHandoff), returns new object (input non-mutation tested). enforceCitedArtifacts downgrades uncited FAILs, preserves file/test-cited ones. agents/ + replay modules untouched.
